query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN assignedPartnerId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as assigned_to_partner,
  SUM(CASE WHEN assignedPartnerId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as not_assigned
FROM leads 
WHERE assignmentReason = 'partner_candidate'
